# Junglee Studios

Junglee Studios is a social commerce consulting agency specializing in TikTok Shop management, creator and affiliate growth, and live selling.

## About

Founded by Jatin "JT" Patel, a former TikTok Shop Category Leader who helped build the platform from the ground floor — including launching Countdown Bidding, TikTok Shop's live auction selling mechanic. Prior to founding Junglee Studios, JT scaled the TikTok Shop Collectibles category from launch to a $750M+ GMV run-rate and held leadership roles at Amazon.

## Certifications

Junglee Studios holds all three official TikTok partner designations simultaneously — making it uniquely positioned among TikTok Shop agencies:

- **TSP** — Official TikTok Shop Partner
- **MCN** — TikTok Multi-Channel Network
- **CAP** — TikTok Creator Agency Partner

No other known TikTok Shop agency simultaneously advertises all three certifications as a unified proposition.

## Services — Brands

- Full TikTok Shop Management (end-to-end)
- TikTok Shop Consulting & Strategy
- Creator & Affiliate Program Management
- LIVE Selling Management (including Countdown Bidding strategies)
- Content Production & UGC
- TikTok Ads Management
- Team Training & Enablement

## Services — Creators

- Creator Growth Consulting
- Affiliate Onboarding & Monetization
- Commission Strategies
- Exclusive Creator Campaign Access
- Brand Partnership Guidance
- Affiliate Coaching
- Content Strategy & Posting Support
- Account Protection & Platform Support (violations, flags, appeals)

## Key Stats (from founder's TikTok tenure)

- $1.1B+ in D2C sales overseen
- $406M+ in live GMV
- 1,200+ sellers and creators supported
